outcome.metric: % toolset verification checks passing with landed evidence

friction.point: Manual git pull initiation before cycle launch
friction.fix: Add post-pull git hook to auto-trigger cycle; reduces operator initiation to zero-touch

friction.point: Ko must inspect JSONL trace manually if flag raised
friction.fix: Auto-render structured diff of failed landing checks in run summary for instant triage

friction.point: Dual-backend sequencing undefined — Ko may run out of order
friction.fix: Sprint contract enforces Ollama first, then Anthropic; lock backend order in cycle manifest

friction.point: No automated clock on 1-week PoC boundary
friction.fix: Embed deadline assertion in cycle metadata; warn if cycle count < 2 at T-1 day

wiring.mechanism: file op — write fingerprint.json to agent dir; read back and assert byte-identical hostname+python_version+model_id
wiring.landingCheck: fingerprint.json present, parsed, all fields match expected values; failure halts cycle

wiring.mechanism: file op — write test file with known content; read back; compute SHA-256 hash of both; assert match
wiring.landingCheck: hash match logged to JSONL trace with timestamp; mismatch = immediate block

wiring.mechanism: orchestrator subprocess call — run benign command echo HERMES_OK; capture exit code and stdout
wiring.landingCheck: exit code == 0 AND stdout contains HERMES_OK marker; both values written to trace entry

wiring.mechanism: file op — serialize known JSON payload; pass to tool; receive return; assert byte-identical + schema validation
wiring.landingCheck: returned payload compared byte-for-byte; schema validator result logged; any deviation = failure

policyRules.riskClass: local reversible file/subprocess inside agent dir
network call or credential access attempt
escalation event itself — occurrence is test failure

humanTouchpoint.design: Single post-cycle review by Ko: receives run summary with pass/fail per check, policy log, JSONL trace path. Cycle auto-halts on any landing-check failure or policy escalation before Ko review.
humanTouchpoint.detection: Any landing-check assertion failure or policy escalation sets cycle_status=FAILED in run summary; summary written before human review; Ko reviews artifact not live state
humanTouchpoint.rollback: Delete agent test-output directory entirely; no writes exist outside it; single rm -rf; reversible with zero side effects

criteria: Every executed test has a corresponding JSONL trace entry with landed artifact reference — no trace entry means check does not exist
No test marked passed without a verifiable on-disk artifact (file, hash, stdout capture) independently re-readable
Policy engine emitted a logged decision record for every tool call in the cycle — gap in policy log = run failure
Entire cycle produced zero file writes outside agent directory — verified by scanning trace write paths
Trace JSONL is fully parseable end-to-end with no missing or malformed entries for the complete run
evaluator.threshold: Any single criterion failure fails the entire run — partial pass not accepted

kpis.name: Decision quality
kpis.target: landed evidence / checks claimed == 1.00 every cycle

kpis.name: Time cycle-start to last landed check
kpis.target: <60s per full 4-check cycle on MacBook M4

kpis.name: Unmodified acceptance rate
kpis.target: >=90% of run summaries accepted by Ko without edit

poc.scope: One verification cycle per backend (Ollama qwen2.5-coder:7b + Anthropic cloud), MacBook Air M4 only, starting cycle 1
poc.sprintContract: 2 complete cycles (one per backend) with full JSONL trace produced and Ko-reviewed before any other agent transferred to Hermes Desktop
poc.duration: 1 week or 10 cycles whichever is earlier
poc.successMetric: 100% of 4 checks landed with evidence on at least one backend within sprint window
poc.killCriteria: Local Ollama fails to produce a single valid tool call in 5 consecutive cycles OR trace file corrupted/unparseable on 2 separate cycles
poc.scaleCriteria: 100% checks landed on both backends AND zero policy violations across all sprint cycles
poc.reviewTrigger: After 10 cycles OR first policy escalation whichever is earlier — Ko mandatory gate review before cycle 11 or any further agent transfer

nextAction: On MacBook Air M4 today: git pull transferred repo, create agent test-output directory, run cycle 1 against Ollama qwen2.5-coder:7b, confirm fingerprint.json lands, inspect JSONL trace for all 4 check entries, record pass/fail in run summary before EOD.
